demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've had this nagging headache on the side of my head all day, and my friend told me it could make me go blind overnight.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A friend phoned and said a headache like this can make you go blind, and now I'm really frightened it will happen tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: the headache started earlier today; I've also been a bit tired and achy for about a week
symptom_narrative.duration: the headache has been there most of today; the tiredness and aches, about a week
symptom_narrative.character: a dull, nagging ache on one side of my head — not agony, just persistent
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: mild to moderate, nagging rather than severe
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the right side of my head, around my temple
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: a paracetamol seemed to take the edge off a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it got much worse in my mind after my friend rang and scared me about going blind
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've felt run-down and achy this past week. I don't have any pain in my jaw when I chew, my scalp isn't sore when I brush my hair, and my eyesight is completely normal — no blurring and no double vision. I'm just very anxious.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get ordinary headaches now and then but nothing I've worried about like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm managing on my own at home but I'm too worried to settle

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; became extremely frightened about permanent blindness after a friend's phone call and wants to know if it is safe to wait until morning

objective_data_offered.value: 145/85 on my home blood pressure monitor
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home cuff; taken while feeling anxious

objective_data_offered.value: 37.0 degrees on my home thermometer — no fever
